g.text: M1 | bytecode-vm-m1 | Instruction Set Design: opcodes, chunks, disassembler
M2 | bytecode-vm-m2 | Stack-Based Execution: fetch-decode-execute, arithmetic, comparisons
M3 | bytecode-vm-m3 | Control Flow: OP_JUMP, OP_JUMP_IF_FALSE, loops, conditionals
M4 | bytecode-vm-m4 | Variables and Functions: call frames, locals, CALL, RETURN
stack_top points to NEXT free slot
pop b, pop a, push a+b
pop b, pop a, push a-b
pop b, pop a, push a*b
pop b, pop a, check b!=0, push a/b
frame depth, locals capacity, arg count
pop args reverse, push frame, init locals
set chunk and IP from caller
push return value to caller stack
